title: The Beer Craft
description: Beer Craft - mod that allows you to brew beer and other alcoholic drinks.
body:
## **The Beer Craft** – Brew your own drinks, from classic beer to stronger spirits, each with unique effects that boost your stats 🍻

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26c73c947a14ddc17c99465b57071f33b66a419b.png)

### Brewing Your First Beer 🍻

1. **Gather ingredients** – Break tall grass to collect hops (2 hops per mug).
2. **Craft the keg** – Make a keg for brewing and one or more empty mugs.
3. **Load the keg** – Two green slots for ingredients, one brown slot for a mug, and a blue slot for water.
4. **Let it ferment** – Wait about 15 seconds for the fermentation to finish.

That’s it - you can now enjoy the buffs!

### **🔻 Video Tutorial Below 🔻**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/phN5E-N-SMg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### ↓↓ Full recipe list below ↓↓

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Some Features:
### 1) Drinks that are in mod

- Beer
- Cider
- Golden Cider
- Potato Beer
- Shiny Decoction

### 2) Mugs can be placed!
They can be delivered both filled with drinks and empty. So you can use mugs as a decoration!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![preview of mugs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea7585bbcb16c7d3cc00cb1a1124a925ee5d525f.png)

</details>


### 3) After drinking an alcoholic drink, effects are applied to the player.

- If you drink beer you will get: regeneration effect for 6 seconds
  
- If you drink cider you will get: regeneration effect for 4 seconds
  
- If you drink golden cider you will get: regeneration effect for 20 seconds and absorption for 2 minutes
  
- If you drink potato beer you will get: strength effect for 10 seconds and nausea effect for 7 seconds
  
- If you drink shiny decoction you will get: regen effect for 3 seconds and night vision for 30 seconds
-
